Projects

Selected work, measured in outcomes

Enterprise programs I've delivered, each one summarized by the impact it made.

GE HealthCare · 2024-Present

Knowledge & AI Content Migration - ServiceNow HRSD

Go-live readiness for a global HR transformation program

Managing the migration of global HR knowledge content into ServiceNow HRSD with AI-assisted review workflows, covering batching strategy, governance, SME validation, access readiness and risk tracking across worldwide stakeholder groups.

ServiceNow HRSDKnowledge ManagementAI-assisted ReviewGovernance

General Electric · 2020-2023

Global Chatbot Quality Program

84% reduction in unresolved chatbot utterances

Ran continuous improvement cycles across platform upgrades, content quality and bot training for GE’s global HR virtual assistants, turning the chatbot from a deflection tool into a channel employees actually trust.

ChatbotsNLPAnalyticsContinuous Improvement

General Electric

Annual Enrollment Bot Training

74% reduction in enrollment-related inquiries

Trained virtual assistants for annual benefits-enrollment use cases, seasonal intent design, content preparation and pre-launch testing that absorbed one of HR’s biggest yearly demand spikes through self-service.

Virtual AssistantsBenefitsSelf-service

GE → GE HealthCare, Aerospace, Vernova · 2021-2023

HR Technology Through the GE Separation

Continuity of HR service channels through a historic corporate split

Aligned HR technology, service channels, chatbot capabilities, portal content and knowledge processes as GE separated into three public companies: GE HealthCare, GE Vernova and GE Aerospace. Kept employee services running while everything underneath changed.

Digital TransformationChange ManagementHR Portals

General Electric

Virtual Assistant Test Automation

Faster, safer releases with higher response accuracy

Automated chatbot regression testing to improve release quality and operational efficiency, replacing manual utterance testing with repeatable automated suites.

Test AutomationQADevOps for Bots

GE HealthCare

Shared Services Operating Playbooks

Standardized execution across global delivery centers

Built operational playbooks, documentation and enablement materials that let global shared-service centers deliver consistently, sustaining operational excellence beyond any single team.

Operating ModelDocumentationEnablement
